ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the asset */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Address or user ID of the creator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the asset was created */,
  "current_owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current owner of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., Dimond Zone, Gold Zone) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the asset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the asset (e.g., Available, Sold, Transferred) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("address"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_current_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset involved in the transaction */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Created, Transferred) */,
  "from_address" TEXT /* Address or user ID of the sender */,
  "to_address" TEXT /* Address or user ID of the recipient */,
  "transaction_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the transaction */,
  "transaction_fee" TEXT /* Fee associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_from_address FOREIGN KEY ("from_address") REFERENCES users ("address"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_to_address FOREIGN KEY ("to_address") REFERENCES users ("address")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address or user ID */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, User) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset associated with the metadata */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the metadata property */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata property */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metadata was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_metadata_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_assets" (
  "user_asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-asset relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the asset owned by the user */,
  "acquired_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the asset was acquired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_assets_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_assets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset associated with the history entry */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Created, Transferred) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_history_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction associated with the log entry */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the activity entry */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., Login, Logout) */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic entry */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Total Assets, Total Users) */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the analytic entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id")
)
